steps.title: Use the parenthetical definition
steps.content: The passage defines literary critics in parentheses as people whose job it is to evaluate books. The question asks for that exact role, so the answer comes directly from the definition.

steps.title: Reject other book roles
steps.content: Choice A names someone who publishes books. Choice C names someone who sells books. Choice D names someone who writes books. The defined term for people who professionally evaluate books is literary critics. The answer is B.
